content:
what team(s) can i use for hard mode w/o gmurphy <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> 
shes killing me more than the enemies and i cant ignore it anymore

try to get all levels to 60 and skill levels to 3

entire team has no soulforge so anything beyond alert 3 is dicey

if its hard just do alert 2 and come back later, its not a sprint
you leveled a billion characters to 60 without knowing what team you are using them on?
soulforge on one character and ignoring all the others is like having 3 soulforge on everyone
3 soulforge on everyone is way cheaper
DPS stats matter the most but supports still scale from soulforge and increase your hp with their con
goliath doesnt even have soulforge 1 unlocked so you are missing his entire arc 2 kit
raising gmurphy from 7 to 8 costs the same as raising everyone else from 1 to 4
idk why you are so averse to upgrading goliath
too broke for the 6 ambers and 1k scrip to upgrade to level 2

i like playing around with them (and i have the materials to do so) so i went ahead and leveled them
figured i'll use at least most of them lategame anyways <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057> 
(also a light spender so i have a spender mindset)
can use them for dtide too
Oh yeah dont upgrade beyond level 3

gmurphy is still the best option for hardmode, so my advice is just to learn to manage sacrifice stacks / get a feel for how risky you can play

if you want to switch you could try a doresain pickman thais comp, or a castor pollux comp, or a tawil comp
doresain is only good in arc 1 hard mode and gets increasingly worse the harder it gets
so i dont recommend going all in on him
but you can try him out for specific stages that have a lot of adds
what would be a good castor pollux comp? thinking of investing into pollux <a:SakuraSip:505907771913535488>
i think its more about the boss matchup and relics you get
maybe like castor pollux horla erica
yes

after you beat arc 2 ch4 you get a posse specifically for her, which should be the best option for gmurphy team in dtide

tawil team should really be running mouse's wisdom, tawil herself draws a billion cards so you dont really need the draw from festival of tides

I kinda don't use festival of tides <:tuff_ramona:1441426630420467753> 

its a good option for if you have nothing to put, but it worked out that all of my teams have an option that is slightly better
Gmurphy posse just directly draws you a waltz
Who should I get for last character for a pure caro team? I have dore, pickman, & Thais. My last awakener is agrippa and I'm planning to change her if there's a better comp
guys
what banner should i pull for as a new player
What is the best Gmurphy team for Act 1?
Why do you want to play pure caro? Best 4th is likely clem
Thais pickman gmurphy

Standard pulls: Pull a bit of each realm for standard character banner until you get a variety of characters you can do story and lightless realm with. Then pull for wheels

Limited pulls: Thais and Gmurphy are the strongest characters you can pull for atm. Get at least 1 copy of both of their wheels as well

Lightless shouldn't even be considered tbh. You can do it with 1 lvl 60 awakener and 3 lvl 1 ones.
There's not much point in pulling for every single realm without realising what you are pulling for, it's just better to choose your DPS for now and build around it for the story clear. Though well, I guess pulling a bit of everything is an option to create 4 d-tide teams for 300 points clear at least. Nevertheless, newcomer won't have enough resources to level all of that up and you can just get some standards while pulling for a Limited.
end of lightless needs 2 characters of that realm

To be precise, GMurphy wants E2/E3 + her wheel
Thais works at E0, but wants E2 + her wheel.
which you cant do without owning one non-welfare character
Uh...well, I just cleared caro one when Thais popped up <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775>
Got Uvhash while pulling for her
I rec pulling for everything because when you start out you have basically nothing
I guess you might get a few caro while pulling for thais, and a few aequor while pulling for gmurphy
Well, but at the same time you don't need to have everything <:idk:1356084138280489080> I guess we just look at the situation from different points of view.
I went to wheel jail after pulling on 1 realm, though I regretted it and went to pull a bit for a second one.
getting one of everyone is very cheap from a standard pulls perspective compared to wheel jail
and it opens up your teamcomps a lot
Better advice than pull blue until caecus e3 <:point:1356053112292511815>
E1 is enough for him
E2 if used with Nautila
yeah exactly
I think its good to have dtide plans early while you still have a lot of resources
Maybe i have brain damage but i can't find the gmurph posse anywhere to unlock
you get it from beating arc 2 chapter 4
The last story chapter currently

Well, it all depends on how active one will be. I stand with a statement that one team > several teams for d-tide. Basically what I would do is invest into one team, clear the story, get more resources, branch out for d-tide teams. 
However, at the same time, if one isn't very active, it's alright to build some d-tide teams earlier to not miss out d-tide rewards.
Ahh
Ty
The self control im trying to exert to just wait until shop refresh for her OE right now
building horizontally early on also lets you clear the manual faster
ultimately its just a priorities thing i guess

But you can't do that unless there's an event with xp pots running. There's currently one, but you also don't have edifying stuff etc in the beginning. While newcomers realise what to farm and to what degree, the event will be already gone.
isnt there always an event with xp pots. like permanently
every event has xp pots
GMurphy one barely gave any
You should only consider the ones like Tawil's and Thais's, where you get 24 purples for 120 energy
Otherwise not even remotely enough to build for d-tide
alert 1 is like level 40
W1 yeah, other waves should be a bit higher
level 50
its not that much

Well, I needed Tawil's/GMurphy's/Thais's event to be able to level up my teams to level 60. 
However, worth to mention that I didn't spend any refillables during Tawil's event.
Pretty much I used my first one on Thais event

"i cant level my teams to 60 :("

meanwhile sitting on 100 crates of meth
idk

Well, newcomers aren't sure what's the best deals to spend for. So expecting them to do everything like you know is beneficial is just weird and somewhat delusional. The situations vary and unless there's one player who's played a game for a while who keeps telling you what to do, you will end up with a few bricks on your account. It's not like it's bad or smth, it's just a game after all. Anyway, like I said, we are just looking at the situation from different perspectives. It's fine <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>

For example, pulling for Caro is very questionable. Unless you get very lucky with a limited, there's only Faint who is worth grabbing and she works at E0. At this point it's just better to spend a standard selector.
Helot at E0 is alright if you have GHelot
maybe i should amend my advice to "ignore character banner, go directly to wheel jail"
"unless you need a specific standard character really badly"

I would say that advice should vary depending on one's box. If that's a complete newcomer, a safe thing to do is to recommend pulling for 2 realms at max. Later on, depending on the box (maybe the guy got some paid stuff or got lucky with a limited within Standard), there could be more options to consider.
I would pull for Aequor/Ultra and decide on what to do after that later

Chaos is Karen who is mostly seen with Kath/Tawil, but both are already gone. Nautila is alright, but I'm not sure how good she is before E3. Alva is required only in specific comps or situations where you need to undo the seal.
Caro is Helot E0 who is alright as a support for GHelot and maybe Lotan within newcomers options
Faint E0 can play pretty much everywhere due to DR, but again, can use selector if you didn't get her within Thais summons.
dont forget nymph, op main dps <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
In caro leigh is fine as well

> Nautila is alright, but I'm not sure how good she is before E3.

Nautila sucks

Source: I run her in dtide

I'm not very familiar with poison comps. They need lily/daff and both are limiteds.
Moreover, they require some investment to work, otherwise you will just die without stacking too much poison.
Yeah I don't even have Nautila, but she is an option to run with Caecus
Leign can generate some embryo, but doesn't have any utility except that and her stats are insanely low.
An alright option if you don't have anything else, but yeah...
Better than nautila (an actual brick)
i use her in dtide as a shield multiplier for my sanga alva comp
I knew that counter comps weren't much of an option so I didn't even think much about getting her
this is my best attempt at making her usable

Hello, new player here barely managed to beat the CH3 boss and I wanted to ask for advice on how to make a better comp, I'm currently using this team.
and this is what I have

Hi everyone, my tawil team has been pretty solid all the way until the end of arc 1, but I’m starting to struggle a lot in arc 2 where if I can’t burst I lose all my hp. Is there anything I could change to make my comp better?
I ran tawil, Murphy, caecus, and nautila for a good portion but nautila and caecus’s 3 costs felt like having a brick in hand every turn
your comp is fine, bosses are hard, its normal to get blindsided if you dont know the fight
if you are having trouble, use the wheels gluttony, frenzy, emerge
and walk into the final boss with 40% bonus hp and op relics
tawil is just kind of shafted by arc 2 tbh
i had this problem as a tawil player as well
https://tenor.com/view/crying-emoji-dies-gif-21956120
the mob mechanics all hard counter tawil and you cant spam infinite wings anymore
i recommend pivoting to gmurphy as your main dps
thank you!
you can run something like gmurphy murphy goliath faros
lemurians get huge buffs from soulforge talent the more you put on your team

ill try it out and lyk how it goes

My friend is also new and asks for a Kath team
Anyone got advice ? :3 ty in advance!
kath + your 3 favorite characters
she is very self sufficient
ideally you have somebody making keyflare, somebody who inflicts vuln and weakness, and maybe somebody who generates arithmetica
but she can legit go with any 3 supports
the meta supports are clementine, horla, tinct, castor (if ultra) or G!ramona, ryker, karen, hameln (if mono chaos)
but you can throw in idiots like erica or ogier or doll and it will work

the only characters that dont work well with kath are other selfish characters that need you to play their cards a lot
kath wants you to be stacking fiamma as much as possible
